headingPrefix: Discover the trends in scientific research.
subheading: Search for articles, analyze emerging keywords, track your interests -- all in one place.
periodLabel: What is the meaning of life?
keywordsLabel: The keywords are all over the place.
sandboxPlaceholder: Enter the keyword, the author, the journal...
noResults: Didn't find the right result for your search.
featuresDesc: It's not just a search engine, it's a platform that helps you break out of the competition of research.
feature1Desc: Search by keyword, author, journal, year. Ranked by relevance. Simple but powerful.
feature2Desc: See which keywords are growing, which topics are saturated, compare multiple keywords on the same chart.
feature3Desc: Follow your favorite keyword/journal. Get an email when you have a new post and don't miss out on important research.
feature4Desc: Bookmark good posts, organize them by project, tag, and read list in your own way.
feature5Desc: Create trend analysis reports, export CSVs or PNGs. Use for academic or collaborative narratives.
feature6Desc: Data from OpenAlex is open, free, no API calls, no paywall.
howToUseDesc: Four steps to gain insight into your field of study
step1Desc: Name keywords you want to study, for example, "LLM", "computer vision".
step2Desc: The trend charting system, and the list of articles is constantly updated
step3Desc: Compare keywords, see paper details, explore related topics
step4Desc: Bookmark a good post, follow a keyword, receive a new post notification
ctaSubheading: Free, no credit card, instant use without registration
footerCredit: Data from the OpenAlex · SInt2801 Project · FPT University 2025
